prompt: Create a 2D fighting game battle screen showing two martial artists in mid-combat
prompt_refined: A classic 2D pixel art fighting game battle screen. Two distinct martial artists are in mid-combat; one on the left performing an aggressive attack, and the other on the right reacting defensively. The screen features a complete fighting game user interface (UI), including a red health bar for the left character and a blue health bar for the right character, both positioned at the top. A central digital timer is displayed below the health bars, and individual special move meters are visible beneath each character's health bar. The background is a detailed, stylized urban street stage with subtle parallax scrolling. Visual effects such as impact sparks, motion blur, and action lines emphasize the intense combat.
objects: Martial artist on the left (performing aggressive attack)
Martial artist on the right (reacting defensively)
Red health bar at the top
Blue health bar at the top
Central digital timer below health bars
Special move meter below left character's health bar
Special move meter below right character's health bar
Detailed, stylized urban street stage background
